tuning_notes: New PB, beat 1:06.701 by 0.133s — telemetry-driven setup change.
Brake pressure 95->90 + bias 51->50 killed T3 front lock-up (slip ratio -0.293 -> -0.085), +10 km/h T3 apex speed.
Rear ARB 20->17 + off-throttle diff 20->30 stabilized the T2 hairpin rear-snap.
Gears: T1 4th, hairpin 2nd, T4 3rd; short-shift to 6th into the final complex.
